summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QuizHub multiplayer trivia game - all backend APIs, admin functionality, frontend UI flows, and WebSocket connections working correctly
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns JSON status ok with version and player_count
POST /api/admin/auth with correct PIN '1234' returns admin token
POST /api/admin/auth with wrong PIN returns 401 unauthorized
Admin-protected endpoints return 401 without valid token
POST /api/join creates player and returns player_id with valid nickname
POST /api/game/start starts game and returns question state
POST /api/answer processes answers correctly with score calculation
POST /api/game/next advances to next question or finishes game
GET /api/leaderboard returns sorted player entries with ranks
POST /api/game/reset resets game to lobby state
GET /api/categories returns list of question categories
POST /api/admin/timer sets timer with valid admin token
POST /api/questions/add adds question with valid admin token
POST /api/questions/delete removes question with valid admin token
WebSocket /api/ws endpoint accepts connections successfully
Frontend: Join screen loads at root URL with nickname input and Join Game button
Frontend: Join flow works - enter name, click Join, see lobby with player list
Frontend: Game start flow - Start Game button initiates question screen
Frontend: Question screen displays with timer, options, category, and question counter
Frontend: Answer selection works with result toast showing correct/wrong feedback
Frontend: Next Question button advances game progression
Frontend: Admin panel loads at /admin.html with PIN authentication screen
Frontend: Admin PIN entry with wrong PIN shows error message
Frontend: Admin PIN entry with correct PIN '1234' unlocks dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows game controls, players, question bank, and stats
Frontend: Admin can add questions via modal form with text, options, answer, category
Frontend: Admin can see question bank with Edit/Delete buttons for each question
Frontend: Admin can see live answer stats and player management with Kick buttons
Frontend: Admin can see real-time game status (LOBBY/QUESTION/FINISHED)
Frontend: Admin panel shows Player View navigation button

success_percentage.backend: 100% (18/18 API endpoints working including admin functionality)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI flows, admin panel, and player view working)
success_percentage.admin_features: 100% (PIN auth, question management, game controls working)
